name: io.github.CodesWhat/portkey-admin-mcp
description: Full Portkey Admin API MCP server — configs, prompts, keys, analytics, and more.

environmentVariables.name: PORTKEY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Portkey API key for authentication

environmentVariables.name: PORTKEY_TOOL_DOMAINS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated tool domains to expose, for example prompts,analytics

environmentVariables.name: PORTKEY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Portkey Admin API base URL. Defaults to https://api.portkey.ai/v1; point at a self-hosted gateway if needed
